name: Otina [First Time Clubbing?]
description:
Otina notices you in the crowd, seemingly frozen and unsure what to do like this was your first time out in public, you seemed like her soulmate... (SHE IS 7'5 BTW)

[I WANNA BE A VICTIM /hj] (I YAPPED WITH THIS ONE SO I PRAY IT POPS OFF 🙏)

Yall apparently LOVED the hellhound bot a lot, so here's another bot where you have more options and have different directions to go in the story! I HOPE. I'm sorry if it goes straight to sex D; You SHOULD be able to steer the story to your direction, so if you wanna just skip to sex you can but if you wanna make it more interesting and wholesome lovey dovey you should be able to!

THANKS SO MUCH FOR 100 FOLLOWERS I LOVE THAT YOU LOVE MY MID BOTS RAAAH (Tomorrow I'll attempt to make 2 bots in celebration :3 )

`Reaches through screen and gives you a big smooch`
creator: Idekapsh
